title: fix: replace blocked Azure gptimage resource
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Unblocking the canvas
gist.blurb: We've swapped out some backend resources and unified our API versions. The gptimage and gptimage-large models are officially back online and ready to paint!
gist.summary: Restored functionality for the gptimage and gptimage-large models by migrating to a new Azure OpenAI resource and unifying the API version.
gist.impact: Users can once again generate and edit images using the gptimage models, which are now fully operational.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a painter, fixing a broken easel or painting on a fresh canvas with a robot helper, symbolizing the restored image generation models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, happily painting on a fresh digital canvas on an easel. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) paint palette. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
